div.p: check: lexeme_equals(peek, "SELECT")? result: true → dispatch
parse projection list: peek → TOK_IDENTIFIER "a" advance → col_ref("a") peek → TOK_COMMA → advance peek → TOK_IDENTIFIER "b" advance → col_ref("b") peek → not COMMA → stop
expect_keyword(p, "FROM", "SELECT") peek → TOK_KEYWORD "FROM" ✓ advance → consume FROM
return table_name = "users" table_name_len = 5
check: peek → TOK_KEYWORD "WHERE"? result: true → advance, enter WHERE
parse_prefix(p): peek → TOK_IDENTIFIER "age" advance → col_ref("age") returns left = NODE_COLUMN_REF
infix loop: peek → TOK_GT (lbp=30, > min_bp=0) advance → consume ">" rbp = 31 (left-assoc: lbp+1)
parse_expr(p, min_bp=31): parse_prefix → TOK_INTEGER_LIT "21" advance → NODE_INTEGER_LIT{21} peek → TOK_SEMICOLON (lbp=-1) return right = NODE_INTEGER_LIT
construct NODE_BINARY_OP: op = ">" left = col_ref("age") right = int_lit(21)
where_clause = BINARY_OP
check: peek → TOK_KEYWORD "ORDER"? no check: peek → TOK_KEYWORD "LIMIT"? no match_type(TOK_SEMICOLON) → advance
Construct SelectStmt: .projections = [col_ref("a"), col_ref("b")] .table_name = "users" .where_clause = BINARY_OP{">"} .order_by = NULL .limit = -1
return AstNode* type = NODE_SELECT
return AstNode* (success) p->had_error == 0
parser_parse(p) SQL: "SELECT a FORM t"
expect_keyword(p, "FROM", "SELECT") peek → TOK_KEYWORD "FORM" lexeme_equals("FORM","FROM") = false
p->had_error = 1 p->error_line = 1 p->error_col = 10 p->error_msg = "[line 1, col 10] expected keyword 'FROM' in SELECT (got 'FORM')"
return peek(p) (un-advanced token)
return NULL p->had_error == 1 caller checks: parser_error_message(p)
